nasb.text: Then Moses commanded them, saying, “At the end of every seven years, at the time of the year of remission of debts, at the Feast of Booths,

esv.text: And Moses commanded them, “At the end of every seven years, at the set time in the year of release, at the Feast of Booths,

cnv.text: 摩西吩咐他們：“每逢七年的最後一年，就是在豁免年的定期，住棚節期間，

ccb.text: 摩西吩咐他们说：“每逢免除债务的第七年的住棚节，
